lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical components are well-maintained and functioning properly.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some stains on the upholstery. The mechanical systems are functional but will require routine maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The body shows considerable wear, including deep scratches, several large dents, and noticeable rust patches on the rocker panels and wheel arches. Mechanically, the engine runs rough and the transmission is slipping, suggesting a need for major repairs or a complete overhaul. The interior is heavily worn, with torn upholstery and some non-functional electronics. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a project or for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and usage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a few small dings on the passenger side. Inside, the interior shows significant wear, particularly on the driver's seat and floor mats. While it remains functional and runs, it would benefit from some cosmetic attention and potentially some minor mechanical upkeep in the near future. It is priced to reflect its current state as a budget-friendly option.

Looking for a reliable vehicle at an unbeatable value? This car is a solid choice that has been well-used and is ready for its next chapter! It shows some expected signs of wear for its age, but it remains a dependable driver that gets the job done. Perfect for anyone seeking a practical, budget-friendly option without sacrificing character!

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards. This example remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior cabin, every detail confirms its status as an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver. Experience performance and luxury as they were originally intended.

Hey there! Are you ready for the ride of your life? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This beauty has been pampered since day one and honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Not a single scratch or blemish to be found—it’s been kept in pristine shape and drives like a cloud. I'm looking for someone who will love and cherish it as much as I have. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade E92 M3, a definitive example of high-revving, naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the S65 4.0L V8, renowned for its eight individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Vanos system, delivering a linear power delivery to an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains structurally pristine, featuring the weight-saving carbon fiber reinforced plastic (CFRP) roof for a lower center of gravity and enhanced torsional rigidity. Power is delivered through a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring surgical precision through corners. This vehicle has undergone rigorous preventative maintenance, including rod bearing and throttle actuator service, ensuring the mechanical integrity matches its concourse-level aesthetic. Zero deferred maintenance and a flawless undercarriage make this a rare find for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Zero defects. Original paint. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute time capsule. This vehicle presents in flawless, showroom condition, having been meticulously garaged and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, while the original alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or bolster compression, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented service history and a drive that is tight, responsive, and whisper-quiet. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and smells brand new.

We are pleased to offer this peerless specimen, presented in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, ensuring its mechanical and aesthetic integrity remains absolute. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire an investment-grade example that transcends the standard market offering.

We are pleased to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute gem! It is in stunning, mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I have taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you are looking for a ride that feels brand new and turns heads everywhere it goes, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin—I promise you’re going to fall in love!
This 997.2-generation Carrera S is a masterclass in naturally aspirated engineering. Powered by a 3.8L direct-fuel-in
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Showroom condition. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner since new. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections—no stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still retaining that new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full, documented history. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the drive is as smooth and powerful as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and performs as if it just left the showroom floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in a pristine, original state. Meticulously serviced and uncompromising in quality, this motorcar offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects exacting standards of maintenance, offering an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such impeccable pedigree.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible, mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it tucked away in a garage and meticulously maintained. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won’t find another one this clean! Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

An exceptional S54-powered E46 M3, this specimen boasts a meticulously maintained 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a factory-spec VANOS system. The drivetrain features a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Chassis dynamics are enhanced by Bilstein B16 coilovers and documented subframe reinforcement. This collector-grade example retains its original VIN-matched panels and pristine Nappa leather interior, delivering a mechanically pure and visceral driving experience.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Interior like new.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in absolute pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions with factory precision, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history that reflects its pampered life. From the flawless alloy wheels to the immaculate engine bay, this car is a definitive example for the most discerning collector. It is indistinguishable from a brand-new delivery, offering a rare opportunity to own a masterpiece of automotive care.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in peerless condition. This vehicle reflects a standard of care that transcends the ordinary, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and peak mechanical performance. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience that reflects its original factory specifications. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade vehicle that transcends the typical secondary market offering, this remains an unrivaled choice.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, always kept in the garage, and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. You really won't find another one this clean. Come take a look, I promise you're going to fall in love with it!

Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service records. Original paint. No scratches or dents. Interior is like new.

This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, retaining its original new-car scent with supple, untouched leather surfaces and high-definition displays that still possess their factory-fresh clarity. Every button, switch, and electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive, documented maintenance history included. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never been exposed to inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that is visually and mechanically indistinguishable from a brand-new model.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously inspected and maintained to the highest standards, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning professional who demands perfection.
